security.//: Strict CSP. Every relaxation below must be justified in ADR 0009 or a follow-up.
default-src 'self' — only bundled assets load by default.
connect-src 'ipc:' http://ipc.localhost — only Tauri IPC for backend calls. External data fetch happens in Rust, not JS.
img-src data: allows embedded SVG/PNG used in the design system.
style-src 'unsafe-inline' is required by Svelte's scoped styles; the compiled bundle contains no remote styles.
assetProtocol: only serve assets from the designated scope; no arbitrary file:// reads.

app.//: Tauri 2 uses capabilities — see capabilities/ directory for the allowlist of IPC commands the frontend can invoke.

bundle.//: macOS hardened runtime — required for notarization, disables library injection.
